industrial.label: Industrial
industrial.caption: 产品结构、CMF、场景和渲染证据

ux.label: UX Prototype
ux.caption: 用户流程、交互原型和可运行演示

ai.label: AI Workflow
ai.caption: AI 辅助建模、渲染和视频表达流程

slides.title: DROPLET
slides.subtitle: 宠物运动水杯
slides.summary: Red Dot Award: Design Concept Winner 2026 项目，面向户外运动场景的宠物补水产品，强调携带、饮水、透明可视和电解质补给的连续体验。
slides.role: 工业设计 / 场景研究 / 产品渲染与 AIGC 表达
slides.problem: 户外运动后的宠物容易出现饮水不足、补给不便和携带负担，普通水杯难以兼顾卫生可视、便携和营养补给。
evidence: 产品主渲染展示使用姿态和造型语言
草图与流程图说明从问题到结构的推导
细节图表现饮水、透明水路和握持关系
slides.output: 一套获得 Red Dot Award: Design Concept Winner 2026 的宠物运动水杯概念，覆盖使用流程、结构表达、外观渲染和场景化展示。
slides.aiRole: AI 用于快速探索产品场景、材质氛围和展示页视觉，再结合草图与结构图收敛方案。

gallery.label: SOURCE RENDER
gallery.caption: 主渲染用于呈现产品姿态、比例、户外运动情境和 Red Dot 2026 获奖标识。

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 1
gallery.caption: 参赛图板 1 展示设计理念与整体造型。

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 2
gallery.caption: 参赛图板 2 表现功能细节与手持体验。

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 3
gallery.caption: 参赛图板 3 展现使用场景与色彩搭配。

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 4
gallery.caption: 参赛图板 4 阐述技术细节与结构推导。

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 5
gallery.caption: 参赛图板 5 说明内部气流、透明水路与功能细节。

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 6
gallery.caption: 参赛图板 6 强调便携性与户外携带场景。

tabs.label: Overview
tabs.title: 户外运动后的宠物补水体验
tabs.body: DROPLET 把便携补水、营养补给和清洁可视压缩到单一产品动作中。
bullets: 对象：户外运动宠物和主人
目标：减少补水和携带负担
产出：产品概念和场景渲染

tabs.label: Process
tabs.title: 场景先行的产品推导
tabs.body: 从户外运动后的脱水风险切入，推导出握持、饮水、透明水路和补给结构。

tabs.label: Output
tabs.title: 从草图到渲染的完整表达
tabs.body: 最终页面同时呈现草图、流程、渲染和场景，使产品方案更容易被岗位筛选者判断。

tabs.label: AI Workflow
tabs.title: AI 加速视觉探索
tabs.body: AI 辅助建立产品展示氛围和视觉叙事，再由产品逻辑筛选可用方向。
bullets: 与手绘和建模结果交叉验证

slides.title: WRIST REHABILITATION
slides.subtitle: 腕部康复评估设计
slides.summary: 面向居家康复阶段的交互原型，以安全确认、动作反馈和训练结果可视化构成完整体验闭环。
slides.role: UX 原型设计 / 本地 Demo 搭建 / 交互流程验证
slides.problem: 骨折或腕部损伤用户在居家训练中缺少即时反馈，容易出现动作不标准、训练中断和恢复结果不可见的问题。
evidence: 安全确认与训练前校准流程
动作识别评分与结果反馈界面
可播放的本地样机视频和多屏 UI 证据
slides.output: 一套可演示的腕部康复训练 App 原型，覆盖开始训练、动作反馈、结果复盘和任务延展。
slides.tools: React Demo / Vibe Coding / UI Mockup / Video Prototype
slides.aiRole: AI 用于辅助生成界面素材、演示叙事和快速迭代视觉状态，最终流程由交互逻辑约束。

gallery.label: UI SOURCE
gallery.caption: 康复 App 的核心界面视觉，证明原型不是静态概念，而是围绕训练流程组织的界面系统。

gallery.label: 4 STEP FLOW
gallery.caption: 四步训练路径用于说明用户如何从校准进入训练，再回到结果反馈。

gallery.label: RESEARCH BOARD
gallery.caption: 问题拆解和前期研究板，说明康复训练的约束、风险和机会点。

gallery.label: DEMO VIDEO
gallery.caption: 本地样机展示视频，用于验证界面节奏、交互反馈和演示完整度。

tabs.label: Overview
tabs.title: 居家康复的可见反馈
tabs.body: 项目把康复训练从“完成动作”转化为“可判断、可记录、可复盘”的交互流程。
bullets: 目标用户：居家康复训练人群
核心价值：降低训练不确定性
交付物：可播放 App 原型和流程页

tabs.label: Process
tabs.title: 从安全校准到结果复盘
tabs.body: 流程优先处理康复产品最关键的安全感，再进入动作识别和训练反馈。
bullets: 动作过程中的反馈节奏
训练后结果和任务映射

tabs.label: Output
tabs.title: Demo 可以直接说明体验
tabs.body: 图片、流程图和视频共同组成招聘场景下可快速判断的 UX 证据。

tabs.label: AI Workflow
tabs.title: AI 作为表达和迭代工具
tabs.body: AI 辅助生成演示状态和视觉资产，但交互逻辑、流程结构和内容判断仍由设计目标决定。
bullets: 保留可解释的流程结构

slides.title: AQUARA
slides.subtitle: 鱼缸清洁机器人
slides.summary: 围绕中大型鱼缸清洁痛点，提出自动爬壁清洁、回仓充电和自清洁结合的产品方案。
slides.role: 工业设计 / 产品策略 / 结构与 CMF 表达
slides.problem: 中大型鱼缸绿藻积累快，人工清洁频率高且容易打扰鱼群，用户需要低干预、稳定维护的清洁方案。
evidence: 六视图用于验证形体和比例
系统图说明回仓、自清洁与工作路径
细节渲染呈现结构、材质和使用场景
slides.output: 一套面向家庭水族场景的机器人产品概念，包含主机、充电回仓、清洁路径和视觉渲染。
slides.aiRole: AI 用于辅助渲染气质、构图探索和视觉表达，核心产品逻辑来自场景痛点和结构设定。

gallery.label: SIX VIEWS
gallery.caption: 六视图展示产品比例、轮廓和关键面关系，是工业设计岗位最直接的形体证据。

gallery.label: SYSTEM CARD
gallery.caption: 系统卡片说明清洁机器人、回仓和使用场景之间的产品逻辑。

gallery.label: DETAIL RENDER
gallery.caption: 细节渲染呈现结构分件、材质对比和产品识别特征。

tabs.label: Overview
tabs.title: 让鱼缸维护变成低干预流程
tabs.body: AQUARA 把清洁、回仓和自清洁整合成一个家庭水族维护系统。
bullets: 场景：1.2 米以上中大型鱼缸
对象：绿藻、玻璃壁、水质维护
产出：机器人和回仓系统概念

tabs.label: Process
tabs.title: 从痛点到结构路径
tabs.body: 项目优先建立工作路径和使用边界，再通过形体推敲表达产品可信度。

tabs.label: Output
tabs.title: 工业设计证据完整
tabs.body: 六视图、系统卡和细节渲染共同支撑产品概念，而不是单张效果图。

tabs.label: AI Workflow
tabs.title: AI 辅助表达但不替代结构
tabs.body: AI 用于提升渲染表达和场景气质，产品结构和功能路径在设计判断中先行。
bullets: 最终页面回到产品证据

slides.title: OUTDOOR COOKWARE
slides.subtitle: 家庭户外炊具设计
slides.summary: 面向家庭户外烹饪场景的炊具产品，围绕安全、便携、收纳和多功能烹饪建立完整的产品方案。
slides.role: 本科毕业设计 / 工业设计 / 产品建模与渲染 / 展板表达
slides.problem: 家庭用户在户外野炊时会遇到传统明火炉具安全隐患、分体式套锅携带收纳繁琐、组件易丢失等问题。
evidence: 新渲染图呈现产品主体、套锅和户外使用情境
展板裁剪保留草图推导、细节展示和场景说明
工程图说明尺寸、结构关系和可制造性表达
slides.output: 一套家庭户外炊具概念，覆盖产品外观、套锅收纳、香料/配件模块、工程尺寸、展板和论文说明。
slides.tools: Rhino / KeyShot / Photoshop / Product Board / Thesis Writing
slides.aiRole: AI 用于辅助提升渲染表达和户外场景氛围，产品结构、论文论证和展板组织来自毕业设计过程。

gallery.label: CONTEXT RENDER
gallery.caption: 户外场景渲染用于说明家庭露营、桌面烹饪和产品使用环境之间的关系。

gallery.label: STUDIO RENDER
gallery.caption: 工作室角度展示主体、内胆套锅、侧向配件托盘和整体黑白 CMF。

gallery.label: SKETCH BOARD
gallery.caption: 从展板中裁出的草图过程，保留造型推导、套锅结构和外壳比例探索。

gallery.label: ENGINEERING
gallery.caption: 工程图呈现产品主视、侧视、俯视和关键尺寸，补足渲染之外的结构证据。

tabs.label: Overview
tabs.title: 面向家庭户外烹饪的安全便携炊具
tabs.body: 项目从家庭户外野炊场景切入，把安全性、便携收纳和多功能烹饪整合进一个炊具系统。
bullets: 目标用户：家庭露营和户外野餐用户
核心价值：降低明火风险与组件管理负担
产出：产品方案、工程图、展板和论文说明

tabs.label: Process
tabs.title: 从论文问题到产品结构
tabs.body: 论文和设计过程共同指向传统明火炉具风险、套锅携带繁琐和组件丢失等问题，再转化为套锅收纳、配件托盘和一体化外壳。
bullets: 草图形态与功能模块推导
展板中保留尺寸、细节和场景证据

tabs.label: Output
tabs.title: 渲染、展板和工程图共同说明方案
tabs.body: 新渲染作为主视觉，展板裁剪提供过程证据，工程图补充尺寸和结构表达，避免只依赖单张效果图。

tabs.label: AI Workflow
tabs.title: AI 用于强化场景表达
tabs.body: AI 主要参与渲染清晰度和户外氛围优化，最终页面仍以建模、展板和论文内容为判断依据。

slides.title: CONTACT
slides.subtitle: 联系 / 个人信息
slides.summary: 孙启圣 / 产品设计硕士在读 / AI 视觉与交互原型方向

projects.title: DROPLET
projects.subtitle: Outdoor pet hydration product
projects.summary: A Red Dot Award: Design Concept Winner 2026 pet hydration product for outdoor exercise, focused on carry, drinking, visible hygiene, and electrolyte supplement scenarios.
projects.role: Industrial design / scenario research / product rendering and AIGC expression
projects.problem: Outdoor exercise creates hydration, hygiene, and carry problems for pets and owners that ordinary bottles do not solve cleanly.
projects.output: An award-recognized product concept covering usage flow, structural expression, rendering, and scenario presentation.
projects.aiRole: AI accelerated scenario mood and material exploration, then sketches and structure diagrams narrowed the final direction.

gallery.label: SOURCE RENDER
gallery.caption: Main render showing posture, proportion, and outdoor exercise context.

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 1
gallery.caption: A4 layout board 1 showing design concept and overall form.

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 2
gallery.caption: A4 layout board 2 explaining functional details and user grip experience.

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 3
gallery.caption: A4 layout board 3 showing outdoor exercise scenarios and colorways.

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 4
gallery.caption: A4 layout board 4 detailing internal structures and design derivation.

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 5
gallery.caption: A4 layout board 5 showing airflow, visible water path, and functional details.

gallery.label: A4 LAYOUT 6
gallery.caption: A4 layout board 6 highlighting portability and carry experience.

tabs.label: Overview
tabs.title: Hydration after outdoor exercise
tabs.body: DROPLET compresses carry, drinking, supplement, and visible hygiene into one product action.
bullets: Award: Red Dot Award: Design Concept Winner 2026
Goal: reduce hydration and carry burden

tabs.label: Process
tabs.title: Scenario-led product reasoning
tabs.body: The project starts from dehydration risk after outdoor activity, then derives grip, drinking, visible water path, and refill structure.

tabs.label: Output
tabs.title: From sketch to render
tabs.body: Sketches, flow diagrams, renders, and scenarios make the product direction easier to evaluate.

tabs.label: AI Workflow
tabs.title: AI speeds visual exploration
tabs.body: AI helped build the display atmosphere and narrative, then product logic filtered the usable direction.
bullets: Cross-check with sketch and model output

projects.title: WRIST REHABILITATION
projects.subtitle: Home rehab UX prototype
projects.summary: A runnable rehabilitation app prototype built around safety confirmation, guided movement feedback, result review, and a replayable local demo flow.
projects.role: UX prototype design / local demo / interaction flow validation
projects.problem: Home rehabilitation users need clear safety confirmation, movement feedback, and reviewable training results without turning the product into a medical black box.
projects.output: A complete app prototype and video evidence set that explains calibration, training, scoring, review, and task continuation.
projects.tools: React Demo / UI Mockup / Video Prototype
projects.aiRole: AI was used to accelerate interface assets, demo narrative, and visual iteration while the interaction structure remained design-led.

gallery.label: UI SOURCE
gallery.caption: Core app interface evidence organized around the training flow rather than a single static screen.

gallery.label: 4 STEP FLOW
gallery.caption: A four-step flow showing how users move from calibration into training and then back to result feedback.

gallery.label: RESEARCH BOARD
gallery.caption: Problem framing and early research evidence for rehabilitation constraints, risks, and interaction opportunities.

gallery.label: DEMO VIDEO
gallery.caption: Local prototype video used to verify rhythm, feedback, and demonstration completeness.

tabs.label: Overview
tabs.title: Visible feedback for home rehab
tabs.body: The project translates training from a vague completion task into a process users can judge, record, and review.
bullets: Deliverable: playable app prototype and flow pages

tabs.label: Process
tabs.title: From safety calibration to result review
tabs.body: The flow handles safety confidence first, then moves into motion recognition, score feedback, and task continuation.

tabs.label: Output
tabs.title: A demo that explains the experience directly
tabs.body: UI, flow diagrams, and video together provide hiring evidence that can be evaluated quickly.

tabs.label: AI Workflow
tabs.title: AI as iteration support
tabs.body: AI helped produce visual states and demo material, while the product logic was constrained by the rehabilitation scenario.

projects.title: AQUARA
projects.subtitle: Aquarium cleaning robot
projects.summary: A product concept for mid-to-large aquariums, combining wall-cleaning, dock charging, self-cleaning, form language, and CMF presentation.
projects.role: Industrial design / product strategy / structure and CMF expression
projects.problem: Large aquariums accumulate algae quickly, while manual cleaning is frequent, disruptive, and hard to keep consistent.
projects.output: A robot product concept covering the body, charging dock, cleaning route, and visual presentation system.
projects.aiRole: AI supported rendering mood and visual exploration; the product route and structure came from scenario constraints.

gallery.label: SIX VIEWS
gallery.caption: Six-view evidence showing product proportion, surface relationships, and key form decisions.

gallery.label: SYSTEM CARD
gallery.caption: System card explaining the relationship between the robot, dock, and cleaning scenario.

gallery.label: DETAIL RENDER
gallery.caption: Detail render for structure, material contrast, and product identity cues.

tabs.label: Overview
tabs.title: A low-intervention cleaning system
tabs.body: AQUARA integrates cleaning, docking, and self-maintenance into one home aquarium care system.

tabs.label: Process
tabs.title: From pain point to product route
tabs.body: The project first defines work boundaries and route logic, then uses form iteration to make the product credible.

tabs.label: Output
tabs.title: Complete industrial design evidence
tabs.body: Views, system cards, and detail rendering support the concept beyond a single hero image.

tabs.label: AI Workflow
tabs.title: AI supports expression, not structure
tabs.body: AI helped explore presentation quality, while function and assembly logic were set by design judgment.
bullets: Final evidence anchored in product logic

projects.title: OUTDOOR COOKWARE
projects.subtitle: Family outdoor cooking system
projects.summary: An undergraduate graduation design for family outdoor cooking, focused on safer cooking, easier carrying, integrated storage, and complete product presentation.
projects.role: Graduation design / industrial design / product modeling and rendering
projects.problem: Family picnic users face open-flame safety risks, cumbersome separated cookware sets, and easily lost accessories in outdoor cooking scenarios.
projects.output: A full product concept covering the cooker body, nested pot, accessory tray, engineering drawing, presentation board, and thesis-based problem framing.
projects.tools: Rhino / KeyShot / Photoshop / Product Board / Thesis Writing
projects.aiRole: AI supported rendering clarity and outdoor scene mood, while the product structure, thesis argument, and board organization came from the graduation design process.

gallery.label: CONTEXT RENDER
gallery.caption: Outdoor context render showing how the product sits in a family camping and tabletop cooking scene.

gallery.label: STUDIO RENDER
gallery.caption: Studio render explaining the body, nested pot, side accessory tray, and black-white CMF direction.

gallery.label: SKETCH BOARD
gallery.caption: Presentation board crop preserving sketch exploration, form logic, and cookware structure reasoning.

gallery.label: ENGINEERING
gallery.caption: Engineering drawing evidence for dimensions, views, and manufacturing-oriented structure expression.

tabs.label: Overview
tabs.title: A safer family outdoor cookware concept
tabs.body: The project turns family outdoor cooking problems into a compact product system that combines safety, storage, carrying, and cooking behavior.
bullets: Users: family camping and picnic groups
Value: lower safety and storage friction
Deliverables: renderings, board crops, drawings, and thesis framing

tabs.label: Process
tabs.title: From thesis problem to product system
tabs.body: The thesis frames open-flame risk, scattered cookware, and accessory loss as design problems, then the product responds with integrated housing, nested pot storage, and an accessory tray.
bullets: Board evidence for details and scenarios

tabs.label: Output
tabs.title: Renderings, board evidence, and drawings
tabs.body: New renders carry the visual presentation, while board crops and engineering drawings keep the project grounded in process and structure.

tabs.label: AI Workflow
tabs.title: AI strengthens presentation only
tabs.body: AI was used for render enhancement and outdoor mood support, with final judgment anchored in modeling, thesis content, and board evidence.
